seoTitle: Duroby vs Durras North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Duroby vs Durras North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Duroby and Durras North.
heading: Duroby vs Durras North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Duroby, New South Wales and Durras North, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Durras North has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Duroby (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Duroby or Durras North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Duroby has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Durras North scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Duroby scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Durras North scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Duroby or Durras North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Durras North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
